animation.compare_true: Condition: {{v1}} > {{v2}} is true, preparing to swap
animation.compare_false: Condition: {{v1}} > {{v2}} is false, no swap needed
animation.round_end: Round complete, Index {{idx}} is now in the correct position
animation.early_exit: No swaps occurred in round {{round}}, array is already sorted, exiting early!
